comment.body:
i also watch the slopeness of the main trendline. 
lets say the market is going up, but the slopness is decreasing = loss of momnetum
lets say rangebound is going on, but the slopeness trurns negative = trend reversal
or slopeness increasing = reversal upward... etc.

you get the idea
